stemHtml: Which of these is one of the main functions of the tilt control (no autotilt) on an airborne weather radar system?

options.a: To keep the transmitter level during the aircraft’s pitch changes.
options.b: To search for areas of intense precipitation at different levels from the aircraft.
options.c: To allow the identification of clear air above a developing thunderstorm.
options.d: To allow the pilots to prevent ground personnel being exposed to radiation.
